name: xmultiverse
description: AI-powered open-world platform: turn any story, film, or book into a navigable world you can explore and roleplay in.
author: XMultiverse Contributors

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=@xmultiverse/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=@xmultiverse/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@xmultiverse/backend && npm run build --workspace=@xmultiverse/frontend && npm run build --workspace=@xmultiverse/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@xmultiverse/backend && npm run build --workspace=@xmultiverse/cli && tsc -p packages/frontend --noEmit
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
